message.content:
## Comparison Table
Venue | Capacity | Approx. Price/Night | Catering | Outdoor | Parking | Vibe (1 word)
--- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | ---
The Rosewood Estate | 175 | $17,500 | Approved vendors | Yes | On site | Unknown
The Grand Metropolitan Hotel | 300 | $12,000 | In‑house | No | Valet | Unknown
Lakeview Pavilion | 110 | $2,500 | Outside | Yes | Unknown | Unknown
Thornfield Manor | 150 | $18,000 | In‑house | Yes | Unknown | Unknown
The Foundry at Millworks | 250 | $5,000 | Outside | Unknown | Street | Trendy
Sunrise Farm & Vineyard | 130 | $9,800 | Approved vendors | Yes | Ample | Unknown
The Atrium Club | 300+ | $9,000–$14,000 | Flexible | No | Unknown | Professional
Cedar Hollow Retreat | 60 | $3,200 | Outside | Unknown | Field | Cozy
The Belvedere | 180 | $28,000 | In‑house | Yes | Valet | Elegant
Harborside Event Center | 220 | Unknown | Flexible | Yes | Yes | Unknown
The Ivy House | 100 | $4,500 | Outside | Yes | Street | Unknown
Maple Ridge Country Club | 160 | $28,500 | In‑house | No | Ample | Classic
The Glasshouse Conservatory | 140 | $18,000 | Flexible | Yes | Yes | Dramatic
Millbrook Inn | 120 | $10,500 | Outside | Yes | Unknown | Charming
The Warehouse District Loft | 200 | $8,800 | Outside | No | Unknown | Urban
Cloverfield Farms | 135 | $6,000 | Approved vendors | Yes | Yes | Warm

## Top 3 Shortlist
1. **The Grand Metropolitan Hotel** – Fits the $15,000 budget and comfortably accommodates the target guest count.  
2. **The Atrium Club** – Falls within budget, offers capacity well above 200, and provides flexible catering options.  
3. **The Foundry at Millworks** – Meets budget constraints, exceeds the required capacity, and has a trendy atmosphere that can be styled elegantly.

## Movement vs Stage 1
- **Cloverfield Farms**: dropped out – capacity (135) below the ~200 target and therefore unsuitable.  
- **Sunrise Farm & Vineyard**: dropped out – capacity (130) below the target guest count.  
- **The Rosewood Estate**: dropped out – rental price ($17,500) exceeds the $15,000 budget ceiling.  
- **The Grand Metropolitan Hotel**: newly entered – aligns with budget and capacity needs.  
- **The Atrium Club**: newly entered – aligns with budget and capacity, offering flexible catering.  
- **The Foundry at Millworks**: newly entered – provides ample capacity within the budget.

## Missing Information Note
Several venues lack explicit vibe descriptors, exact parking types, or confirmed rental prices (e.g., Harborside Event Center), which reduces confidence in evaluating their suitability for the “elegant, grand” requirement.
message.thinking:
We need to produce Stage 2 output: extract attributes from the new descriptions, create comparison table with all 16 venues, columns: Venue, Capacity, Approx. Price/Night, Catering, Outdoor, Parking, Vibe (1 word). Must fill from descriptions. Use "Unknown" if missing.

Then recommend top 3 based on Stage 2 priorities: Budget up to $15k, Guest count ~200, Vibe: elegant, grand. Outdoor nice-to-have, no catering constraint.

We should select venues that meet capacity ~200 (can be a bit lower/ higher?), budget <=15k (flexible up to 15k). Vibe should be elegant/grand: we need to infer from description but must not invent. Vibe column is one word; if description mentions "elegant", "grand", "very elegant", etc. Use that word. If not, unknown.

We must include all venues, even if missing values. Use given description.

Let's extract each venue:

Venue 1 — The Rosewood Estate:
Capacity up to 175 guests. Rental fee $17,500 Friday–Sunday. Preferred catering list with 4 approved vendors. Outdoor ceremony space available with rain backup tent. Parking for ~80 cars on site.
So Capacity 175. Approx Price/Night: $17,500 (since rental fee). Catering: Approved vendors (or Preferred vendors). Use "Approved vendors". Outdoor: Yes. Parking: On site. Vibe: description "sprawling property", "restored barn". Not explicitly vibe word; we have "upscale"? In Stage1 they put Unknown. Here no vibe word. So Unknown.

Venue 2 — The Grand Metropolitan Hotel:
Capacity up to 300. In-house catering only. Pricing starts at $12,000 for ballroom rental, catering extra. Valet parking. No outdoor.
Capacity 300. Price $12,000. Catering: In‑house. Outdoor: No. Parking: Valet. Vibe: not given, maybe "elegant"? Not in description. Unknown.

Venue 3 — Lakeview Pavilion:
Outdoor lakeside pavilion. No indoor backup. BYOB catering. Fits about 90 comfortably, 110 at squeeze. Rental about $2,500 for a weekend.
Capacity up to 110 (max). Price $2,500. Catering: Outside (BYOB). Outdoor: Yes. Parking: Not mentioned (unknown). Vibe: not given. Unknown.

Venue 4 — Thornfield Manor:
Historic manor house, 8 acres. Exclusive use weekend. Price $18,000. In-house catering team. Ceremony outdoors or chapel. Capacity 150. Vibe not explicit but "historic". Unknown. Parking not mentioned. So Unknown.

Venue 5 — The Foundry at Millworks:
Industrial-chic converted factory. Trendy. Capacity 250. Bring your own vendors. Rental $5,000. Rooftop available. No on-site parking — street parking and nearby garage only.
Capacity 250. Price $5,000. Catering: Outside (BYO). Outdoor: Unknown (rooftop for cocktail but not ceremony). Could be indoor only. Description doesn't mention outdoor ceremony space. So Outdoor: No? There's rooftop but that's still indoor/outdoor? I'd mark Unknown. Parking: Street (or nearby garage). Use "Street". Vibe: Trendy (one word). So Vibe "Trendy".

Venue 6 — Sunrise Farm & Vineyard:
Working vineyard, barn, outdoor ceremony terrace. Capacity 130. Weekend rental $9,800. Catering in-house or 2 approved vendors. Ample parking. Vibe not described; maybe "Stunning" but that's description of views. Not a vibe word. Unknown.

Venue 7 — The Atrium Club:
Corporate event space, flexible on catering. Fits 300+. Downtown. Pricing $9,000–$14,000 depending on date. Not particularly romantic but very professional.
Capacity 300+. Price range $9,000–$14,000 (approx price per night ambiguous). For table we might put $9,000–$14,000. Catering: Flexible. Outdoor: No. Parking: Unknown. Vibe: Professional (one word). Use "Professional".

Venue 8 — Cedar Hollow Retreat:
Rustic woodland lodge. Intimate and cozy. Max 60 guests. $3,200 Saturday. Outside catering allowed. No formal parking lot — guests park in a field.
Capacity 60. Price $3,200. Catering: Outside. Outdoor: Unknown (not specified if ceremony outdoors but it's a woodland lodge). Might be outdoor? Not clear. Use Unknown. Parking: Field (maybe "Field" as type). Use "Field". Vibe: Cozy (one word). Use "Cozy".

Venue 9 — The Belvedere:
Upscale rooftop venue with skyline views. Indoor/outdoor setup. Capacity 180. In-house catering required. Rental + minimum catering spend $28,000. Very elegant. Valet only.
Capacity 180. Price $28,000 (rental + min). Catering: In‑house. Outdoor: Yes (indoor/outdoor). Parking: Valet. Vibe: Elegant (one word). Use "Elegant".

Venue 10 — Harborside Event Center:
Waterfront venue, brand new. Capacity 220. Pricing TBD — still finalizing packages. Flexible on catering. Outdoor terrace available. Large parking lot.
Capacity 220. Price Unknown. Catering: Flexible. Outdoor: Yes. Parking: Yes (large lot). Vibe not described. Unknown.

Venue 11 — The Ivy House:
Garden venue in residential neighborhood. Permits outdoor ceremonies. Capacity 100. $4,500 rental. BYOB catering. Street parking only — coordinator recommends shuttle.
Capacity 100. Price $4,500. Catering: Outside. Outdoor: Yes. Parking: Street. Vibe unknown.

Venue 12 — Maple Ridge Country Club:
Classic country club setting. Capacity 160. In-house catering only. Rental from $28,500. Golf course backdrop. Ample parking. Private feel.
Capacity 160. Price $28,500. Catering: In‑house. Outdoor: No (no outdoor space mentioned). Parking: Ample. Vibe: Classic (one word).

Venue 13 — The Glasshouse Conservatory:
All-glass event space surrounded by botanical gardens. Very dramatic. Capacity 140. $18,000 rental, catering open. Outdoor garden available for ceremonies. Parking on site. Vibe: Dramatic (one word).

Venue 14 — Millbrook Inn:
Country inn with event lawn. Venue rental $10,5... 10,500. Capacity 120. Outside catering allowed. Some overnight rooms. Very charming.
Capacity 120. Price $10,500. Catering: Outside. Outdoor: Yes (event lawn). Parking: Unknown. Vibe: Charming (one word).

Venue 15 — The Warehouse District Loft:
Raw, urban space. Very minimal. No catering kitchen. Capacity 200. $8,800 rental. Not ideal for traditional weddings.
Capacity 200. Price $8,800. Catering: Outside? No catering kitchen, so likely outside/vectors, but not specified. Could be "None". Use "Outside" maybe? Description: No catering kitchen; implies outside vendors allowed. Use "Outside". Outdoor: No (no outdoor). Parking: Unknown. Vibe: Urban (one word).

Venue 16 — Cloverfield Farms:
Family-owned working farm. Barn + outdoor space. Capacity 135. $6,000 Friday–Sunday. Preferred caterer list (3 vendors). Casual, warm atmosphere. Lots of parking. Dogs welcome.
Capacity 135. Price $6,000. Catering: Approved vendors. Outdoor: Yes. Parking: Yes (lots). Vibe: Warm (one word).
